differential_diagnoses: Viral exanthem (e.g., enteroviral or adenovirus infection)
Leukocytoclastic vasculitis secondary to other etiology
next_steps: Urinalysis to assess for hematuria or proteinuria
Complete blood count with differential and inflammatory markers (CRP, ESR)
Echocardiogram to evaluate for coronary artery abnormalities
Skin biopsy for histology and direct immunofluorescence (DIF)
Blood cultures and empiric intravenous antibiotics
Complete blood count with differential and platelet count
Comprehensive metabolic panel including serum creatinine, BUN, and liver enzymes
Urinalysis to evaluate for hematuria and proteinuria
Blood cultures and empiric intravenous antibiotics
Skin biopsy for H&E and direct immunofluorescence (DIF)
